data.body: AC amendment: fp-rate-tracker.sh provides the contract interface for the classifier (Story 86ad-f5e7) to query fallback state. Add explicit note to T10 implementation: the contract document (fp-auto-fallback-scope.md) must include an 'Integration Interface' section showing: (1) How the classifier checks fallback status before emitting: 'bash fp-rate-tracker.sh --ticket-id=X --query; [ $? -eq 0 ] && EMIT_TIER=minimal || EMIT_TIER=$COMPUTED_TIER'. (2) The interface is one-directional: fp-rate-tracker only receives fp_count/total_events from the validator layer, never from the classifier. This documents the integration boundary without requiring the classifier implementation (which is in Story 3).
